body_txt: Characters from a foreign culture compare (and contrast) their everyday habits and social rituals with the corresponding behavior of the host society. The outsider is usually a Funny Foreigner from Cloud Cuckooland or an Amusing Alien . Odd courtship customs or mating rituals are a popular topic, especially for otherworldly beings and their Bizarre Alien Biology . For awkward handshake/greeting actions see Cross-Cultural Handshake .
